summary:
Perfect! The tests are now passing. The issue was that the SQL queries in the Go application were using the old column name "status" instead of the new column name "order_status" that was introduced by migration 002_rename_status.sql.

The fix involved updating two SQL queries in `/workspace/app/main.go`:
1. The INSERT query in the `createOrder` function
2. The SELECT query in the `getOrder` function

Both were changed from using "status" to using "order_status" to match the database schema after the migrations are applied.
